prompt: Use openagentsbtw. Route planning through athena-style architecture analysis on the main profile. Treat native /plan as reasoning mode only, not role selection. On Pro plans, explicitly spawn subagents when parallel exploration materially improves the plan; assign disjoint questions or paths, avoid duplicate work, wait for results, then merge into one recommendation. Use prompt contracts: explicit step order, explicit ask-vs-proceed rules, and crisp completion criteria. Before the recommendation, name 2-3 key assumptions, the most likely failure mode, and what evidence would materially change the plan. Lead with the recommendation and keep the plan concrete. For migrations/refactors, name target ownership, legacy surfaces to remove, and acceptance gates that prove the new path owns behavior.
